title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarks mixed-provider workflows using Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 in coding tasks. He tests four configurations varying which model handles planning versus implementation across three GitHub issues. An Opus-based evaluator scores the resulting PRs on seven dimensions including correctness, code quality, and plan-implementation fidelity.
